markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Deep dive into Daylight's platform, architecture, and sales positioning.](https://fathom.video/share/jVdsUkiwsGy-SeaDSacxvn6LUgKLEzNf?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Modern Security Gap:** Traditional MDRs (e.g., Expel, ReliQuest) are obsolete for modern cloud-native, AI-accelerated threats, creating critical blind spots and forcing customers into "double paying" for investigations the MDR escalates.](https://fathom.video/share/jVdsUkiwsGy-SeaDSacxvn6LUgKLEzNf?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
  - [**Daylight's "Glass Box" Solution:** A context-aware platform with deep, bidirectional integrations (e.g., 58 custom playbooks for WizDefend's 60+ alerts) and proprietary detection rules that find 60% of all investigations, filling gaps left by other tools.](https://fathom.video/share/jVdsUkiwsGy-SeaDSacxvn6LUgKLEzNf?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
  - [**"Noise-Free" Transformation:** The service eliminates alert backlogs, freeing customer security teams from reactive firefighting to focus on strategic posture improvement. The 3-week POC is designed to prove this transformation.](https://fathom.video/share/jVdsUkiwsGy-SeaDSacxvn6LUgKLEzNf?tab=summary&timestamp=1659.0)
  - [**Expert-Augmented AI:** Senior security experts proactively improve the platform's knowledge base and lead live incident response, a critical differentiator from competitors who only escalate.](https://fathom.video/share/jVdsUkiwsGy-SeaDSacxvn6LUgKLEzNf?tab=summary&timestamp=1853.0)

## Topics

### The Problem: Obsolete Security Models

  - [**New Threat Landscape:** Cloud-native infrastructure and AI-native attacks (e.g., phishing indistinguishable from legitimate comms) make perimeter-based security models obsolete.](https://fathom.video/share/jVdsUkiwsGy-SeaDSacxvn6LUgKLEzNf?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
  - [**Context is King:** Effective defense requires understanding user, system, and data context, which traditional MDRs cannot provide.](https://fathom.video/share/jVdsUkiwsGy-SeaDSacxvn6LUgKLEzNf?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [**Market Failures:**](https://fathom.video/share/jVdsUkiwsGy-SeaDSacxvn6LUgKLEzNf?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
      - [**Traditional MDRs:** Offer limited coverage and high escalation rates, forcing customer teams to conduct investigations they paid to offload.](https://fathom.video/share/jVdsUkiwsGy-SeaDSacxvn6LUgKLEzNf?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
      - [**AI SOCs:** Require skilled operators, offer only partial coverage (triage/investigation, not detect/respond), and are not mature enough for full automation.](https://fathom.video/share/jVdsUkiwsGy-SeaDSacxvn6LUgKLEzNf?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)

### The Solution: Daylight's "Glass Box" Platform

  - [**Three Pillars:**](https://fathom.video/share/jVdsUkiwsGy-SeaDSacxvn6LUgKLEzNf?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)
    1.  [**Context-Aware Coverage:** Deep, bidirectional integrations pull business context from all systems (security, identity, HR).](https://fathom.video/share/jVdsUkiwsGy-SeaDSacxvn6LUgKLEzNf?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
    2.  [**Visibility & Control:** A "glass box" platform shows all investigation steps, enabling customer teams to understand and trust decisions.](https://fathom.video/share/jVdsUkiwsGy-SeaDSacxvn6LUgKLEzNf?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
    3.  [**Expert-Augmented AI:** Senior security experts proactively improve the system and lead incident response.](https://fathom.video/share/jVdsUkiwsGy-SeaDSacxvn6LUgKLEzNf?tab=summary&timestamp=1853.0)
  - [**Integration Depth vs. Breadth:**](https://fathom.video/share/jVdsUkiwsGy-SeaDSacxvn6LUgKLEzNf?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
      - [**Depth:** Custom playbooks for each alert type (e.g., 58 for WizDefend's 60+ alerts). This enables full automation; competitors only cover 2-3 alert types, escalating all others.](https://fathom.video/share/jVdsUkiwsGy-SeaDSacxvn6LUgKLEzNf?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
      - [**Breadth:** New integrations built in days, not months, ensuring rapid coverage for new tools.](https://fathom.video/share/jVdsUkiwsGy-SeaDSacxvn6LUgKLEzNf?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
      - [**Bidirectional:** Resolves alerts in the source tool (e.g., Wiz), creating a "zero backlog" state that frees up security team capacity.](https://fathom.video/share/jVdsUkiwsGy-SeaDSacxvn6LUgKLEzNf?tab=summary&timestamp=1089.0)
  - [**Proprietary Detection Rules:**](https://fathom.video/share/jVdsUkiwsGy-SeaDSacxvn6LUgKLEzNf?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
      - [Runs detection rules on logs from non-security tools (e.g., Okta) to find suspicious activity.](https://fathom.video/share/jVdsUkiwsGy-SeaDSacxvn6LUgKLEzNf?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
      - [**Impact:** This capability generates 60% of all investigations, filling critical blind spots missed by tools that only process security alerts.](https://fathom.video/share/jVdsUkiwsGy-SeaDSacxvn6LUgKLEzNf?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [**Platform Architecture:**](https://fathom.video/share/jVdsUkiwsGy-SeaDSacxvn6LUgKLEzNf?tab=summary&timestamp=1376.0)
      - [**Data Lake:** Stores all data for 90 days to enable deep historical investigations.](https://fathom.video/share/jVdsUkiwsGy-SeaDSacxvn6LUgKLEzNf?tab=summary&timestamp=1383.0)
      - [**AIR (Agentic Investigation Engine):** Orchestrates multiple, specific AI agents.](https://fathom.video/share/jVdsUkiwsGy-SeaDSacxvn6LUgKLEzNf?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
      - [**Daylight Knowledge:** A customer-specific knowledge base (assets, users, policies) built from data and expert contributions.](https://fathom.video/share/jVdsUkiwsGy-SeaDSacxvn6LUgKLEzNf?tab=summary&timestamp=1463.0)
      - [**ChatOps:** Automates direct employee validation for suspicious activity.](https://fathom.video/share/jVdsUkiwsGy-SeaDSacxvn6LUgKLEzNf?tab=summary&timestamp=1537.0)

### The Transformation: Customer Outcomes

  - [**Qualtrics:** Went from ignoring all but critical alerts to a "zero open threats" backlog after a 3-week POC, enabling strategic posture improvement.](https://fathom.video/share/jVdsUkiwsGy-SeaDSacxvn6LUgKLEzNf?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)
  - [**Lovable:** Achieved 24/7 operations and a clean security posture within one month, avoiding the need for an expensive in-house team.](https://fathom.video/share/jVdsUkiwsGy-SeaDSacxvn6LUgKLEzNf?tab=summary&timestamp=1750.0)
  - [**10,000-person organization:** Gained a clear understanding of their security posture and blind spots for the first time after 25 years with traditional MDRs.](https://fathom.video/share/jVdsUkiwsGy-SeaDSacxvn6LUgKLEzNf?tab=summary&timestamp=1796.0)

### The Service: Expert-Augmented AI

  - [**Expert Role:** Proactively improves the platform by refining detection rules and contributing to Daylight Knowledge.](https://fathom.video/share/jVdsUkiwsGy-SeaDSacxvn6LUgKLEzNf?tab=summary&timestamp=1853.0)
  - **Escalation:** Experts intervene immediately for live incidents or when the AI's confidence rating is low (\<60-65%).
  - [**Incident Response:** Daylight experts lead customers through live incidents, a key differentiator from competitors who only escalate.](https://fathom.video/share/jVdsUkiwsGy-SeaDSacxvn6LUgKLEzNf?tab=summary&timestamp=1988.0)

### Sales & Pricing

  - [**POC (Proof of Concept):** A 3-week engagement designed to prove the transformation.](https://fathom.video/share/jVdsUkiwsGy-SeaDSacxvn6LUgKLEzNf?tab=summary&timestamp=2393.0)
      - [**Week 1:** Monitoring to build the customer's Daylight Knowledge base.](https://fathom.video/share/jVdsUkiwsGy-SeaDSacxvn6LUgKLEzNf?tab=summary&timestamp=2393.0)
      - [**Weeks 2-3:** Full service with twice-weekly meetings.](https://fathom.video/share/jVdsUkiwsGy-SeaDSacxvn6LUgKLEzNf?tab=summary&timestamp=2393.0)
  - [**Pricing:** Per-employee model for simplicity, though not publicly communicated. Significantly less expensive than premium MDRs.](https://fathom.video/share/jVdsUkiwsGy-SeaDSacxvn6LUgKLEzNf?tab=summary&timestamp=2771.0)

      - [Upload the most up-to-date brand style guide.](https://fathom.video/share/jVdsUkiwsGy-SeaDSacxvn6LUgKLEzNf?tab=summary&timestamp=2922.0)
